name: EGB OE TL.Z./Covestro
summary: Covestro AG is a German manufacturer of polymers and high-performance plastics, developing solutions for a variety of industries including automotive, construction, and electronics. Headquartered in Leverkusen, Germany, Covestro focuses on innovation and sustainability, producing materials like polyurethanes and polycarbonates. Their business model centers around providing materials and application solutions to its customers, with a strong emphasis on research and development for new product applications.
